sentences.arabic: أَرَادَ طَارِقٌ أَنْ يَعْرِفَ كَيْفَ يَطْبُخُ الْأَرُزَّ.
sentences.translation: Tariq je htio naučiti kako kuhati pirinač.
sentences.translationEn: Tariq wanted to know how to cook rice.
He searched for the recipe on the internet.

sentences.translation: Pronašao je kratki video koji objašnjava korake.
sentences.translationEn: He found a short video explaining the steps.

sentences.translation: Slijedio je korake i uspješno skuhao pirinač.
sentences.translationEn: He followed the steps and cooked the rice successfully.
